author: titan
description: ACT-R skill-compilation proposer (arch §13.3 / §8.4, PLAN_synthesis_engine_Phase8.md §P8.E, D-SPEC-PHASE8). Phase 8 graduates this from the P2 TIMER stub into a real dream-boundary trigger: FORK_READ the last 168h of procedural-fork tool-call TXs filtered to scored_by ∈ {oracle, llm} (Tier-1-verified per INV-Syn-15), then emit META_SKILL_COMPILATION_CANDIDATE when ≥ (miner_min_seq_len × miner_min_occurrences) traces accumulate — the minimum material the ProceduralMiner needs to find one recurrent sequence. The actual recurrence detection lives in synthesis/procedural_miner.py (canonicalize_call + cluster_sequences + filter_recurrent); this contract is the upstream gate that wakes the miner, NOT the matcher itself (arch §13.2 separation of concerns; RuleEvaluator stays model-free per D-P2-3).
